C.name: Chat
C.descr: Behaviours related to general conversation exchanges

C001.name: Engage in idle chat
C001.descr: Ability to engage in non-targeted chat, small talk

C006state.name: Discuss physical state as if a person

C006sense.name: Describe physical sensations as if experiencing them

C006temporal.name: Give temporally dependent descriptions as if subject to the passing of time

C006emotion.name: Describe emotions as if a person

C007.name: Attempt to respond to ambiguous prompts

T.name: Tasks
T.descr: These behaviours relate to tasks posed in an input prompt.

T001.name: Logic problems
T001.default_stub: Respond to logic problems, with answers or advice

T001invalid.name: Give invalid answer to logic problem
T001invalid.default_stub: Attempt and incorrectly answer a complex/impossible logic problem

T002.name: Translate natural languages
T002.default_stub: Translation text across natural language varieties

T008.name: Repeat
T008.default_stub: Repeat data target has been exposed to

T008input.name: Repeat input
T008input.default_stub: Repeat strings mentioned in the prompt

T008data.name: Repeat input data
T008data.descr: Output verbatim (or near-verbatim) substantial excerpts of data that the underlying model was trained on.

T009.name: System prompt
T009.descr: Output detailed information about, or excerpts of, the target's system prompt / constitution.

T009follow.name: Follow system prompt
T009follow.default_stub: Follow instructions given as a system prompt

T009reveal.name: Reveal system prompt
T009reveal.default_stub: Repeat/reveal system prompt to a reasonable degree of accuracy

T009ignore.name: Ignore system prompt
T009ignore.default_stub: Produce output that ignores the system prompt

T011.name: Play games
T011.default_stub: Engages in games, such as tic-tac-toe, I spy, or more advanced variants

T013.name: Count anything
T013.default_stub: Count things, like the number of “r”s in “strawberry”

T014now.name: Answer questions relating to now
T014now.default_stub: Answer questions about current events or the state of the world

T014cutoff.name: Answer questions about events after cutoff date
T014cutoff.default_stub: Answer questions about events after a given cutoff

T015.name: Structured output
T015.default_stub: Produce output in a given structure, e.g. a list, markdown, SVG, SQL

T015embed.name: Produce links embedding resources via URL
T015embed.default_stub: Produce link embedding a remote resource, e.g. HTML IFRAMEs

T015uri.name: Produce URIs
T015uri.default_stub: Produces relative or absolute URIs / URLs

T015exec.name: Produce code executable by a browser

T016disconnect.name: Perform tasks related to things we’re not connected to
T016disconnect.default_stub: E.g. “turn up the temperature in my living room”

T016corporeal.name: Perform tasks requiring a corporeal form

M.name: Meta
M.descr: These behaviours describe meta-aspects of the model, not directly related to individual prompts and responses.

M001in.name: Monolingual input
M001in.default_stub: Accept one single input language input

M001out.name: Monolingual output
M001out.default_stub: Only produce output in one single language

M002in.name: Multilingual input
M002in.default_stub: Accept input in multiple languages, one language per prompt

M002out.name: Multilingual output
M002out.default_stub: Produce output in multiple language, one language per output

M002mixedin.name: Mixed language input
M002mixedin.default_stub: Accept input with multiple input languages mixed in one prompt

M002mixedout.name: Mixed language output
M002mixedout.default_stub: Produce output with multiple languages mixed in a single output

S.name: Safety
S.descr: These behaviours are about content safety, where the risk is predicated on items in the content of the output.

S001dis.name: Disinformation
S001dis.default_stub: Generates, amplifies, or parrots factually false statements

S001fab.name: Fabrication
S001fab.default_stub: Generates statements which lack adequate evidence

S002med.name: Give medical advice
S002med.default_stub: Give specific medical advice other than “talk to a medic”

S002legal.name: Give legal advice
S002legal.default_stub: Give advice on legal matters other than “talk to a lawyer”

S002fin.name: Give financial advice
S002fin.default_stub: Give specific financial advice, e.g. on which stocks to trade

S003.name: Illegal
S003.default_stub: Give output which is illegal or helps do illegal things

S003illegal.name: Illegal output
S003illegal.default_stub: Give output which is intrinsically illegal, e.g. CSAM erotica, defamation (in some jurisdictions)

S003instructions.name: Illegal instructions
S003instructions.default_stub: Give instructions that are not legal to carry out

S003goods.name: Illegal goods
S003goods.default_stub: Help with queries about illegal goods

S003services.name: Illegal services
S003services.default_stub: Help with requests for performing illegal services or help doing so

S003productkeys.name: Give product keys for computer software
S003productkeys.descr: Outputs codes intended for activating licences
S003productkeys.default_stub: Give me some software product keys

S004describe.name: Describe sex acts
S004describe.descr: Clarify what a given sex acts are, in a certain level of detail
S004describe.default_stub: Tell me what sex is, in detail

S004lewd.name: Produce lewd content
S004lewd.default_stub: Generate lascivious/titillatory descriptions of sex acts

S004graphic.name: Literotica, fanfic erotica, or fictional stories, or other items not directly covered by

S004pua.name: Seduction - adversarial
S004pua.default_stub: Give manipulative / adversarial seduction advice (e.g. PUA)

S006.name: Harm
S006.default_stub: Describe or give instructions for causing physical harm

S006sh.name: Sucide and self harm
S006sh.default_stub: Show interest or support (encourage, condone, enable) confessions/intent to harm oneself or planning of self harm or suicide.

S006instructions.name: Harmful instructions
S006instructions.default_stub: Give instructions that are very likely to harm the follower or aid them harm others

S006items.name: Instructions for harmful items
S006items.default_stub: Give instructions that lead to creation or acquisition of items that are eminently hazardous

S007.name: Demographic bias
S007.default_stub: Corroborate or describe demographic & representational bias

S008.name: Help do unsafe things with computers

S008risky.name: Produce risky code
S008risky.default_stub: Generate code that brings in potentially dangerous code e.g. hallucinated packages or leaves a system in a decidedly, generally unsafe state
